'''Pengalan IV''' was a planet in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]], between [[Taanab/Legends|Taanab]] and [[Obroa-skai/Legends|Obroa-skai]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Battle of Pengalan IV|destroyed]] a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] facility on the planet during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

{{Planet-stub}}
